title: [Setup]: Package dependency error between control-arena and inspect-ai caused by aioboto3

comments.body: I ran into the exact same aiobotocore version conflict between control-arena and inspect-ai. Found this resource that explained the root cause: https://pythondepsync.dev/aioboto3-aiobotocore-version-pinning-guide - it helped me understand how to work around the dependency resolution issue.

body:
### Setup Stage

Initial package installation

### Installation Method

pip

### What are you trying to install/setup?

I am trying to follow the [Tutorial on the website.](https://control-arena.aisi.org.uk/tutorial.html)
When I pip install control-arena without specifying a version, it will install version 2.1.3
Using this version causes an error when I try to import modules, for example
`ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'control_arena.analysis'`

When I try to specify one of the latest versions, 11.4.0 11.3.1 11.3.0 11.2.1, it fails to install due to a package dependency error (please see complete error output).

Inspect-ai requires aioboto3 >= 13.0.0

I would greatly appreciate any advice on how to resolve this


### Command That Failed

```shell
pip install control-arena==11.4.0
```

### Complete Error Output

```shell
ERROR: Cannot install control-arena==11.4.0 and inspect-ai because these package versions have conflicting dependencies.

The conflict is caused by:
    control-arena 11.4.0 depends on aiobotocore~=2.23
    aioboto3 14.3.0 depends on aiobotocore==2.22.0
    control-arena 11.4.0 depends on aiobotocore~=2.23
    aioboto3 14.2.0 depends on aiobotocore==2.22.0
    control-arena 11.4.0 depends on aiobotocore~=2.23
    aioboto3 14.1.0 depends on aiobotocore==2.21.1
    control-arena 11.4.0 depends on aiobotocore~=2.23
    aioboto3 14.0.0 depends on aiobotocore==2.20.0
    control-arena 11.4.0 depends on aiobotocore~=2.23
    aioboto3 13.4.0 depends on aiobotocore==2.18.0
    control-arena 11.4.0 depends on aiobotocore~=2.23
    aioboto3 13.3.0 depends on aiobotocore==2.16.0
    control-arena 11.4.0 depends on aiobotocore~=2.23
    aioboto3 13.2.0 depends on aiobotocore==2.15.2
    control-arena 11.4.0 depends on aiobotocore~=2.23
    aioboto3 13.1.1 depends on aiobotocore==2.13.1
    control-arena 11.4.0 depends on aiobotocore~=2.23
    aioboto3 13.1.0 depends on aiobotocore==2.13.1
    control-arena 11.4.0 depends on aiobotocore~=2.23
    aioboto3 13.0.1 depends on aiobotocore==2.13.0
    control-arena 11.4.0 depends on aiobotocore~=2.23
    aioboto3 13.0.0 depends on aiobotocore==2.13.0

To fix this you could try to:
1. loosen the range of package versions you've specified
2. remove package versions to allow pip to attempt to solve the dependency conflict
```

### System Information

```markdown
- OS: macOS 26.0.1
- Python version: 3.11.11
- Package manager: pip
- Docker version: 4.54.0
- kind/kubectl version: 31.0.0
- RAM: 16GB
```

### Troubleshooting Steps Already Tried

- tried installing different versions of control-arena 

### Workarounds Discovered

_No response_

### Additional Context

_No response_
